curation_notes: Locations derived from the patch diff. The patch adds path.Clean() normalization in three non-test source files: rule/rule.go (IsMatching), proxy/request_handler.go (InitializeAuthnSession), and proxy/proxy.go (ConfigureBackendURL). Two additional non-test files (rule/engine_glob.go and rule/repository_memory.go) had only cosmetic changes (renaming unused parameters to _). Marked as noisy because 5 non-test source files were changed in total. Vulnerability class path-traversal confirmed: CWE-23 (Relative Path Traversal) matches, the patch adds path normalization, and the advisory explicitly describes path traversal authorization bypass. No sibling files found with the same unpatched vulnerability pattern. Re-curated with updated L3 hints that are now more specific than L1/L2.
